
```{r}
#| label: setup


library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
here()

source("analysis/functions.R")
```


Import Data
```{r}
#| label: data_import

HLEF_HFF_14C_DC_AO <- read.csv( here("data/dataframes/HLEF_HFF_14C_DC_AO.csv"))
glimpse(HLEF_HFF_14C_DC_AO)

```
